wiki.summary: "Golden" is a song performed by the fictional K-pop girl group HUNTR/X in the 2025 animated musical fantasy film KPop Demon Hunters. The film was released on Netflix on June 20, 2025 and follows HUNTR/X, consisting of members Rumi, Mira, and Zoey, whose singing voices are performed by Ejae, Audrey Nuna, and Rei Ami, respectively. The film's accompanying soundtrack album was released on the same day, with "Golden" as the fourth track. It was released on July 4, 2025 as the second single from the film's soundtrack album. Read more on Last.fm.
